summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Suburbmates UI/UX overhaul with Huly-inspired design. All major sections render correctly with dark premium aesthetic, proper fonts, and interactive elements working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Mobile navigation data-testid not found during initial desktop testing but exists and works correctly on mobile viewport

passed_tests: Homepage hero section renders with dark premium background and gradient headline 'Get Your Products Discovered'
Header renders with glass-blur effect, Suburbmates logo, navigation links (Directory, About, Help), search input, Sign In and Join Feed buttons
CTA Section renders with 'Claim Your Profile' heading, feature list with checkmarks, and 'Get Started — Free' button
Featured Section renders with 'Get Featured' heading, benefit list, 'Learn More' button, and featured preview card with atmospheric glow
Browse Section renders 4 category cards and 6 region buttons with proper interactions
How It Works section renders 3 step cards (Create Profile, Get Discovered, Drive Traffic)
Why Join section renders benefits list and CTA card with 'Join Free' button
FAQ section renders as accordion with 4 questions that expand/collapse correctly
Footer renders with brand, navigation links, legal links, social icons, and copyright
All sections have proper data-testid attributes for testability
Design uses Plus Jakarta Sans and Outfit fonts correctly (not Inter or Poppins)
Pill-shaped buttons with correct orange/amber CTA color (#F97316)
No dark-text-on-dark-background issues - all text is readable
Modal functionality works correctly (signup modal opens and closes)
Category and region cards are clickable with proper interactions
Region bottom sheet opens when clicking region cards
Mobile navigation visible and functional on mobile viewport
Responsive design works across desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844) viewports
